# claude_agent (Resource)

A reusable, versioned Claude agent configuration (model, system prompt, tools, MCP servers, and skills). Agents cannot be hard-deleted; `terraform destroy` archives the agent (existing sessions keep running).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "claude_agent" "coding_assistant" {
  name   = "Coding Assistant"
  system = "You are a helpful coding agent. Always write tests."

  model = {
    id    = "claude-opus-4-8"
    speed = "standard"
  }

  # Complex, evolving union fields are supplied as JSON.
  tools = jsonencode([
    { type = "agent_toolset_20260401" }
  ])

  metadata = {
    team = "platform"
    env  = "production"
  }
}

output "agent_id" {
  value = claude_agent.coding_assistant.id
}

output "agent_version" {
  value = claude_agent.coding_assistant.version
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (Attributes) The Claude model that powers the agent. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--model))
- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the agent.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of what the agent does.
- `mcp_servers` (String) MCP servers, as a JSON array. Not refreshed on read.
- `metadata` (Map of String) Arbitrary key-value pairs for your own tracking.
- `multiagent` (String) Coordinator declaration listing agents this agent can delegate to, as a JSON object. Not refreshed on read.
- `skills` (String) Skills, as a JSON array. Not refreshed on read.
- `system` (String) System prompt defining the agent's behavior and persona.
- `tools` (String) Tools available to the agent, as a JSON array. Combines pre-built agent tools, MCP tools, and custom tools. Not refreshed on read (the API enriches entries with defaults), so out-of-band changes here are not detected.

### Read-Only

- `archived_at` (String) Archive timestamp (RFC 3339), or null if active.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Agent identifier.
- `type` (String) Object type (always `agent`).
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `version` (Number) Current agent version. Starts at 1 and increments on each change.

<a id="nestedatt--model"></a>
### Nested Schema for `model`

Required:

- `id` (String) Model ID, e.g. `claude-opus-4-8`. Claude 4.5-family and later are supported.

Optional:

- `speed` (String) Inference speed: `standard` (default) or `fast`. Fast mode requires a supported Opus model.
